hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git\s+commit'; then echo '🔍 Running pre-commit lint checks...'; CHANGED=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if echo "$CHANGED" | grep -q 'services/core-service'; then (cd services/core-service && npm run lint 2>/dev/null) || echo '⚠️  core-service lint issues'; fi; if echo "$CHANGED" | grep -q 'services/ai-service'; then (cd services/ai-service && ruff check . 2>/dev/null) || echo '⚠️  ai-service lint issues'; fi; if echo "$CHANGED" | grep -q 'apps/web'; then (cd apps/web && npm run lint 2>/dev/null) || echo '⚠️  web lint issues'; fi; echo '✅ Pre-commit checks done'; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git\s+push'; then echo '🔍 Running pre-push tests...'; CHANGED=$(git diff origin/$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null)..HEAD --name-only 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if echo "$CHANGED" | grep -q 'services/core-service'; then (cd services/core-service && npm test 2>/dev/null) || { echo '❌ core-service tests failed' >&2; exit 2; }; fi; if echo "$CHANGED" | grep -q 'services/ai-service'; then (cd services/ai-service && pytest -q 2>/dev/null) || { echo '❌ ai-service tests failed' >&2; exit 2; }; fi; if echo "$CHANGED" | grep -q 'apps/web'; then (cd apps/web && npm test -- --watchAll=false 2>/dev/null) || { echo '❌ web tests failed' >&2; exit 2; }; fi; echo '✅ Pre-push checks passed'; fi

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git\s+commit'; then HASH=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo '?'); MSG=$(git log -1 --format='%s' 2>/dev/null || echo ''); BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo '?'); TS=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M'); echo "[$TS] $HASH | $BRANCH | $MSG" >> claude-progress.txt 2>/dev/null || true; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if [ -n "$FILE" ]; then EXT="${FILE##*.}"; case "$EXT" in ts|tsx|js|jsx|json) npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; py) ruff format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; dart) dart format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; kt|kts) which ktlint >/dev/null 2>&1 && ktlint --format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac; fi
